name: Qualified Lead Classifier AND Notifier

nodes.name: When Executed by Another Workflow
nodes.notes: ENTRY POINT — Receives lead data from the main workflow. Expects 5 inputs: Name, Email, Message, Company info (string), Qualified (boolean). No setup needed here.

nodes.name: AI Agent
nodes.notes: Classifies the qualified lead as either 'SaaS' or 'Agency' using the Ollama model. Outputs a single word. Powered by the Ollama Chat Model node below — no setup needed here.

nodes.name: Ollama Chat Model
nodes.notes:
SETUP REQUIRED — Connect your Ollama credential here.
1. Go to Settings > Credentials > Add > Ollama.
2. Set Base URL to: http://localhost:11434 (or your Ollama server address).
3. Ensure the model is available: run 'ollama pull deepseek-v3.1:671b-cloud' in your terminal.

nodes.name: If1
nodes.notes: Routes lead by AI classification. TRUE branch (output matches 'Agency') → Agency lead notification. FALSE branch → SaaS lead notification. Both branches then send the confirmation email to the lead. No setup needed.

parameters.subject: New Agency lead
parameters.message: =New Agency Lead: {{ $('When Executed by Another Workflow').item.json['Company info'] }}

nodes.name: New Agency lead
nodes.notes:
SETUP REQUIRED — Notifies your sales team of a new Agency lead.
1. Connect your Gmail OAuth2 credential.
2. Replace the 'sendTo' email address with your sales team's email.

parameters.subject: New SaaS lead
parameters.message: =New SaaS Lead: {{ $('When Executed by Another Workflow').item.json['Company info'] }}

nodes.name: New SaaS lead
nodes.notes:
SETUP REQUIRED — Notifies your sales team of a new SaaS lead.
1. Connect your Gmail OAuth2 credential.
2. Replace the 'sendTo' email address with your sales team's email.

parameters.subject: Selection Confirmation – Lead Position
parameters.message:
=Dear ,{{ $('When Executed by Another Workflow').item.json.Name }}

We are pleased to inform you that your request has been accepted. After careful consideration, we are delighted to confirm your selection as a new Lead.

Your skills, dedication, and potential have made you a strong fit for this role, and we are confident that you will contribute significantly to the team’s success. We look forward to seeing your leadership in action and the positive impact you will bring.

Further details regarding your responsibilities and next steps will be shared with you shortly.

Congratulations on your selection, and welcome to your new role!

Best regards,
Virus
Head of Sales, Big Boy Recruits (BBR)
Dallas, TX

nodes.name: Selection Confirmation – Lead Position
nodes.notes:
SETUP REQUIRED — Sends a confirmation email to the qualified lead. The recipient is pulled automatically from the form submission.
1. Connect your Gmail OAuth2 credential.
2. Optionally update the email body and sign-off to match your branding.

description:
SUB-WORKFLOW — Do NOT activate this alone. It is triggered automatically by the 'Lead Qualification Agent (Form Submissions)' workflow when a lead is qualified.

SETUP STEPS:
1. Import this workflow AFTER importing 'Lead Qualification Agent (Form Submissions)'.
2. In the 'Ollama Chat Model' node: connect your Ollama credential (base URL: http://localhost:11434). Ensure the deepseek-v3.1:671b-cloud model is pulled and running ('ollama pull deepseek-v3.1:671b-cloud').
3. In 'New Agency lead' and 'New SaaS lead' Gmail nodes: replace the 'sendTo' email with your sales team's email.
4. In the 'Selection Confirmation' Gmail node: connect your Gmail OAuth2 credential. The recipient email is pulled automatically from the form — no change needed.
5. Copy this workflow's ID from the URL bar and paste it into the 'Call Qualified Lead Classifier AND Notifier' tool node in the main workflow.
6. Activate this workflow BEFORE activating the main workflow.
